channel.title: Kissimmee Planning Advisory Board - Public Notices
channel.description: Public notices for Kissimmee Planning Advisory Board meetings and proceedings

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) RFP-26-15883-JG Prequalification of Contractors for Continuing Park...
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) RFP-26-15883-JG Prequalification of Contractors for Continuing Parks, Conservation Areas, and Lake Management Activities on a Task Authorization Basis. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for Questions: Thursday, June 4, 2026, at 12:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Jovany Galarza - (407) 742-0943. 2) PS-26-15841-PC Boardwalk on Pleasant Hill Professional Services for Master Planning, Engineering, and Permitting. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Tuesday, June 2, 2026, at 10:00 AM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 913 024 007#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, June 10, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. 3) RFP-26-15878-PC Homeowner Inspection Services. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Tuesday, June 2, 2026, at 12:30 PM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 524 569 1281#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, June 10, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. May 28, 2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Orlando
item.description:
OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS 1
--- Full Notice Text --- OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS 1. RFP-26-15883-JG Prequalification of Contractors for Continuing Parks, Conservation Areas, and Lake Management Activities on a Task Authorization Basis. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for Questions: Thursday, June 4, 2026, at 12:00PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 2:00PM Local Time. Contact: Jovany Galarza - (407) 742-0943. 2. PS-26-15841-PC Boardwalk on Pleasant Hill Professional Services for Master Planning, Engineering, and Permitting. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Tuesday, June 2, 2026, at 10:00 AM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906- 2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 913 024 007#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, June 10, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. 3. RFP-26-15878-PC Homeowner Inspection Services. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Tuesday, June 2, 2026, at 12:30 PM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 524 569 1281#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, June 10, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. 78623 5/24/2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1. RFP-26-15882-MB Osceola County Board of County Commissioners is seeking proposals Mowing and Landscaping for the Osceola County Sheriffs Training Facility. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. There will be a NON-MANDATORY SITE VISIT held on June 4th, 2026, from 8:00 10:30 AM Local Time. The deadline for questions is June 12, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. DUE DATE: Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Melissa Baumwell (407) 742-0938. 2.AR-26-15881-GD Tractor Mowing for Neo City. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for Questions: Tuesday, June 2, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 16, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Daniel Gutierrez - (407) 742-0939. 3.RFP-26-15388-PC Emergency Shelter Medical Services Pre & Post Event. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Tuesday, May 26, 2026, at 1:00 PM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 662 382 890#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, June 3, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 16, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. 4.PS-26-15837-PC PD&E Study for Old Canoe Creek Road Improvements (Canoe Creek Road to Clay Whaley Road). The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Thursday, May 28, 2026, at 3:00 PM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 482 553 184#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, June 3, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 16, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. 5.PS-26-15852-PC Design Services for the Neptune Middle School Sidewalk Project Funded by Community Development Block Grant (CDBG) #B-25-UC-12-0020. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Friday, May 29, 2026, at 10:00 AM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 212 807 41#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, June 3, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 16, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. May 21, 2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Orlando
item.description:
OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1
--- Full Notice Text --- OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1. RFP-26-15882-MB Osceola County Board of County Commissioners is seeking proposals Mowing and Landscaping for the Osceola County Sheriffs Training Facility. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. There will be a NON-MANDATORY SITE VISIT held on June 4th, 2026, from 8:00 10:30 AM Local Time. The deadline for questions is June 12, 2026 at 2:00 PM Local Time. DUE DATE: Tuesday, June 23, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Melissa Baumwell (407) 742-0938. 2. AR-26-15881-GD Tractor Mowing for Neo City. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for Questions: Tuesday, June 2, 2026, at 2:00PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 16, 2026, at 2:00PM Local Time. Contact: Daniel Gutierrez - (407) 742-0939. 3. RFP-26-15388-PC Emergency Shelter Medical Services Pre & Post Event. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Tuesday, May 26, 2026, at 1:00 PM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 662 382 890#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, June 3, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 16, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. 4. PS-26-15837-PC PD&E Study for Old Canoe Creek Road Improvements (Canoe Creek Road to Clay Whaley Road). The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Thursday, May 28, 2026, at 3:00 PM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 482 553 184#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, June 3, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 16, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. 5. PS-26-15852-PC Design Services for the Neptune Middle School Sidewalk Project Funded by Community Development Block Grant (CDBG) #B-25-UC-12-0020. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. A VIRTUAL Non-Mandatory Pre-Proposal Conference will be held on Friday, May 29, 2026, at 10:00 AM Local Time via the Microsoft TEAMS Application. Dial-in using (407)-906-2344, and when prompted enter the Conference Code: 212 807 41#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, June 3, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 16, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Paul Callaway (407) -742-0932. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. 74916 5/17/2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) RFP-26-15880-JG Mowing and Landscaping Services for Small Machine ...
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) RFP-26-15880-JG Mowing and Landscaping Services for Small Machine Area II. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for Questions: Tuesday, May 19, 2026, at 12:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 2, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Jovany Galarza - (407) 742-0943. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org [http://vendorlink.osceola.org]. May 7, 2026
